channel.title: +श्री-रङ्गम् on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +श्री-रङ्गम् on पुराणे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Tenkalai victory
item.description:
koil olugu

Tk won Srirangam as their temple by using koil olugu which was being maintained by a tenkalai ‘accountant’. The record doesn’t mention any vdk contribution to the temple. Only a century later, when inscriptions were being read, people saw that the koil olugu is not a full record of the temple as it was claimed in 1803

Archaka suppression

The Archakas, who wear Vadakalai mark upon their foreheads, cannot even dream of introducing any Vadakalai custom into the temple. That is Ramanujarya Divyajna! They cannot prostrate before God, twice in the temple. If they dare to do so they are liable to be punished. - PB aNNangarAryaH Source: TW
